top_signals.title: Halkbank Iran Sanctions Case Tossed as Judge Grants DOJ Request
top_signals.summary: A federal judge allowed the Justice Department to formally drop a long-running criminal case against Turkish state-owned lender Turkiye Halk Bankasi AS for allegedly helping Iran move billions of dollars in violation of US sanctions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury yields are little changed as investors await Fed interest rates decision
top_signals.summary: U.S. Treasury yields were little changed on Wednesday as investors await the outcome of Kevin Warsh's first Federal Reserve policy meeting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Onchain, in court: What happened in crypto legal news this week
top_signals.summary: The Polymarket insider trading case and a retrial of Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm are expected to move forward in late 2026 while former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky awaits a response to his motion to vacate his sentence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SMM, MS&D, ALL ABOUT PORTS Experts Discuss Key Challenges Facing Maritime Industry
top_signals.summary: Geopolitical uncertainty, decarbonization, digitalization and new energy efficiency requirements are fundamentally reshaping the maritime industry. At the joint press conference for SMM 2026, MS&D Conference & Expo and ALL ABOUT PORTS, representatives from industry…
